title: 12th Pass Jobs 2026 – Customer Service Officer
shortInfo: NABARD Financial Services (NABFINS) Recruitment 2026 for post of Customer Service Officer (Field Officer). Candidates with 12th Pass Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NABFINS official website nabfins.org.

basic_details.job_title: NABFINS Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NABARD Financial Services (NABFINS) Recruitment 2026 for post of Customer Service Officer (Field Officer). Candidates with 12th Pass Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NABFINS official website nabfins.org.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NABFINS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.details: Customer Service Officer (Field Officer): PUC/10+2 completed. Valid driving license and ownership of a two wheeler is mandatory. Fluent in local language. Fresher's are eligible to apply.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the NABFINS Customer Service Officer (Field Officer) position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 29th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned email address before this deadline.

faq.question: What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed PUC or 10+2. A valid driving license and ownership of a two-wheeler are also mandatory requirements.

faq.question: Is there any age limit for the Customer Service Officer (Field Officer) role?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit for this position is 33 years. There is no mention of a minimum age limit in the provided data.

faq.question: How can I apply for the NABFINS Customer Service Officer (Field Officer) job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their resume via email to the addresses provided in the 'How to Apply' section of this article.

faq.question: What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a full-time employment opportunity with NABARD Financial Services (NABFINS).

faq.question: Which city is this job located in?
faq.answer: The job is located in Srikakulam, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Are freshers eligible to apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, freshers are eligible to apply for the Customer Service Officer (Field Officer) position.

faq.question: What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Nabhfins/OPS/1101.

faq.question: What are the essential requirements besides educational qualification?
faq.answer: A valid driving license and ownership of a two-wheeler are mandatory. Fluency in the local language is also required.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.

seo_tags: NABARD Financial Services Customer Service Officer Recruitment 2026
